headings.usage: Use for all section titles, hero text, and major calls to action.

body.usage: Use for all body text, buttons, inputs, and functional UI elements.

display.usage: Use ONLY for the Token Number display on the TV screen.

visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: Use for high-conversion cards (Booking Summary). Animated gradient border.
visual_enhancers.grain_overlay: opacity-20 pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 mix-blend-overlay url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards instead of p-4.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest font-bold px-8 py-3 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-3 transition-all
buttons.accent: bg-gold text-black hover:bg-gold-hover rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest font-bold px-8 py-3 shadow-glow

cards.style: bg-charcoal border border-white/5 rounded-none p-6 hover:border-white/10 transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 rounded-none px-0 py-3 text-white focus:border-gold focus:ring-0 placeholder:text-white/30 transition-colors

badges.token: bg-white/10 text-white border border-white/20 px-3 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider

customer_booking.layout: Mobile-first wizard steps. Hero section with barber image -> Service Selection -> Date/Time -> Barber -> Details -> Confirmation.
customer_booking.key_elements: Large touch targets for time slots. Barber avatars. Sticky summary footer.

live_display.layout: TV Optimized. Split screen: Left 60% (Current Token - HUGE), Right 40% (Upcoming List).
live_display.typography: Token Number: text-[15vw] font-bebas. Status: text-4xl.

staff_dashboard.layout: Dense high-contrast table/list. Quick actions (Next, Skip) prominent at top.
staff_dashboard.features: Real-time queue list. Toggle for 'My Queue' vs 'All'.

analytics.layout: Bento Grid. Key Metrics (Total Tokens, Wait Time, Revenue) in top cards. Charts below.
analytics.charts: Simple line/bar charts using Recharts. Monochrome with Gold accent.

images.alt: Barber in action black and white

assets.icons: Use Lucide React (Scissors, Calendar, User, Clock, CheckCircle, XCircle).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-zinc-400 is readable on bg-zinc-950. Use text-zinc-300 if needed.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44px height for all mobile interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Install Google Fonts in index.html. Use Tailwind Config to extend colors with 'obsidian', 'charcoal', 'gold'.
instructions_to_main_agent.theme_enforcement: Hardcode 'dark' class in html tag or body to force dark mode since this is a black-themed app.
instructions_to_main_agent.libraries: Use 'framer-motion' for page transitions. Use 'sonner' for toasts. Use 'recharts' for analytics.
instructions_to_main_agent.critical: Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid Obsidian/Zinc-950. Use gradients only for text clips or borders.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts
Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
